commands.review_summary:
Adds scoped mention-pattern policy configuration for global, agent, provider, and conversation scopes, applies it across bundled channel runtimes, and updates SDK exports, docs, generated metadata, changelog, and tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR rather than a bug report. The behavior is reviewable through latest-head source inspection, exact-head terminal proof, and targeted tests instead of a failing current-main reproduction.
commands.review_followup: This is a broad cross-channel config and SDK feature with no narrow automated repair remaining; maintainer owner review and merge judgment are the next action.

commands.review_summary:
The PR adds cron-scoped Codex collaboration instructions and regression tests so scheduled Codex turns run exact cron payloads before workspace/bootstrap inspection.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence current-main live reproduction was established in this read-only review. Source inspection does show cron triggers currently receive no turn-scoped Codex instructions while the PR body provides after-fix live output from the affected isolated cron pattern.
commands.review_followup: The protected `maintainer` label and current failing checks make this a human review/validation item, not an automated cleanup or repair job.
